plot_candidates.title: Scatter Plot of Band Gap vs Energy Above Hull
plot_candidates.description: This plot shows the relationship between band gap and energy above hull for materials.
plot_candidates.rationale: Visualizing the stability (energy above hull) against electronic band gap can help identify potential materials that balance stability with insulating properties.

plot_candidates.title: Scatter Plot of Density vs Band Gap
plot_candidates.description: This plot shows the relationship between density and band gap for materials.
plot_candidates.rationale: Understanding the link between density and band gap assists in selecting materials that are both dense enough and have appropriate insulating properties.

plot_candidates.title: Scatter Plot of Density vs Energy Above Hull
plot_candidates.description: This plot shows the relationship between density and energy above hull for materials.
plot_candidates.rationale: This visualization aids in identifying materials that optimize density without compromising stability.

plot_candidates.title: Histogram of Band Gap
plot_candidates.description: Histogram displaying distribution of band gaps among materials.
plot_candidates.rationale: Analyzing the distribution of band gaps helps in assessing the electronic properties of materials.

plot_candidates.title: Histogram of Energy Above Hull
plot_candidates.description: Histogram displaying distribution of energies above hull among materials.
plot_candidates.rationale: This histogram helps in understanding the stability distribution within the materials set.

plot_candidates.title: Histogram of Density
plot_candidates.description: Histogram displaying distribution of densities among materials.
plot_candidates.rationale: Helps identify the range and common values of densities, crucial for material selection.

plot_candidates.title: 3D Scatter of Band Gap, Energy Above Hull, and Density
plot_candidates.description: 3D scatter showing the relationship among band gap, energy above hull, and density.
plot_candidates.rationale: Combining all three dimensions gives a holistic view of the material's properties.

plot_candidates.title: 3D Scatter of Energy Above Hull, Density, and Band Gap
plot_candidates.description: 3D scatter showing the relationship among energy above hull, density, and band gap.
plot_candidates.rationale: Different axis orientations help to identify trends or clustering in multi-dimensional space.

plot_candidates.title: 3D Scatter of Density, Band Gap, and Energy Above Hull
plot_candidates.description: 3D scatter plot showing the relationships of density, band gap, and energy above hull.
plot_candidates.rationale: Exploring different 3D arrangements provides insights into multi-property interrelations.

plot_candidates.title: Alternate 3D Scatter of Band Gap, Density, and Energy Above Hull
plot_candidates.description: 3D scatter plot offering a different perspective using band gap first.
plot_candidates.rationale: Rotating axes increases understanding of how density affects the other properties.
